    <p>Belanja di BXc Mall bisa sekalian dapat <strong>diskon tiket BXSea 50%</strong>? <br><br>Bisa dong! BXSea sedang ada <strong>Shop & SEA Promo</strong>!<br><br>Cukup belanja di tenant BXc Mall pilhan, yang bekerja sama dengan <strong>min. pembelian Rp250.000</strong>, kamu sudah bisa mendapatkan <strong>discount 50%</strong> tiket masuk BXSea. Wooww banget kan?<br><br><strong>Weekday: Rp80.000</strong><br><strong>Weekend: Rp95.000</strong><br><br>12–17 Maret 2026<br><br>Habis shopping dan jajan jangan langsung pulang…<br>lanjut explore Sea and Rainforest di BXSea yuk!</p>

    $value[0]['promotion_desc_en']
    <p>Can you shop at Bintaro Jaya Xchange (BXc) Mall and get a <strong>50% discount</strong> on BXSea tickets at the same time?</p><p>You bet! BXSea is currently running the <strong>Shop & SEA Promo</strong>!</p><p>Simply spend a minimum of <strong>Rp250,000</strong> at participating BXc Mall tenants to unlock a 50% discount on your BXSea entrance ticket. Sounds amazing, right?</p><h3>Promo Ticket Prices:</h3><p><strong>Weekday:</strong> Rp80,000</p><p><strong>Weekend:</strong> Rp95,000</p><p><strong>Promo Period:</strong> March 12–17, 2026</p><p>Don't head home right after your shopping spree and snacks... come and explore the <strong>Sea and Rainforest</strong> at BXSea!</p><p><strong>Would you like me to help you draft a catchy social media caption for this promo?</strong></p>

    <p>Yuk, sambut mereka yang kini hadir di BXSea — <strong>Penguin Humboldt </strong></p><p><br>Kamu sudah bisa melihat langsung sahabat baru yang menggemaskan di <strong>Penguin Journey BXSea</strong> mulai bulan ini, loh!<br><br><strong>Sabtu, 18 Oktober 2025</strong><br><strong>BXSea, Bintaro Jaya Xchange Mall 2, Level B1</strong><br><br>Kamu juga berkesempatan mendapatkan exclusive merchandise edisi Penguin <br><br>Catat tanggalnya dan jadi bagian dari petualangan baru bersama <strong>Penguin Humboldt, hanya di BXSea! </strong>Sea You~ <br> </p>
    promotion_desc_en => UTF-8 string (568) "<p>Let’s welcome our newest residents at BXSea — the Humboldt Penguins!</p><...
    $value[2]['promotion_desc_en']
    <p>Let’s welcome our newest residents at BXSea — the Humboldt Penguins!</p><p>You can now meet these adorable new friends up close at <strong>Penguin Journey BXSea</strong> starting this month!</p><p><strong>Saturday, October 18, 2025</strong><br><strong>BXSea, Bintaro Jaya Xchange Mall 2, Level B1</strong></p><p>You’ll also have the chance to get <strong>exclusive Penguin edition merchandise</strong>!</p><p>Mark your calendar and be part of this exciting new adventure with the Humboldt Penguins — only at BXSea! <strong>Sea You~</strong></p><p> </p>
